query: I am still in bed reading and want to time a few things while I finish. Close blinds 2 in living room fully closed 13 minutes from now because I do not want street glare on the plants. Also get TV 1 in bedroom playing 28 minutes from now so it is ready when I get up. Plus nudge it to 65.0% closed 28 minutes after the previous action to keep a softer glow in the living room.

steps.thought: I need to verify the current time, then get all rooms to find the correct room IDs, then get devices in living room and bedroom to find 'blinds 2' and 'TV 1'. I'll start by checking the current time.
Current time is 2025-08-23 10:39:51. Next, I'll get the list of rooms to identify the correct room_ids for living room and bedroom.
Now I'll get the devices in the living room and bedroom to find the correct device IDs.
The living room has two window covering controllers. Now I need to get devices in the bedroom to find TV 1.
I'll get the structure of the window covering controller to find the appropriate command for closing fully and for setting to 65%.
I need to check the WindowCovering cluster documentation to understand the percentage values for closing. I'll search for GoToLiftPercentage.

error.detail: The api_key client option must be set either by passing api_key to the client or by setting the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable

steps.thought: I need to get the structure of the TV to find the command to turn it on.
I'll schedule the first workflow: close blinds 2 fully in living room at 10:52:51. Use GoToLiftPercentage with 10000 (100% closed).
Now schedule the second workflow: turn on TV in bedroom at 11:07:51. Use execute_command with On.
Now schedule the third workflow: nudge blinds to 65.0% closed (GoToLiftPercentage with 6500) at 11:20:51 (28 minutes after first action).
All three actions have been scheduled successfully. The first action closes blinds 2 fully at 10:52:51, the second turns on TV 1 at 11:07:51, and the third sets blinds to 65% at 11:20:51.

action_input.answer: I've scheduled all your requests: close blinds 2 in the living room fully (to 100%) at 10:52:51, turn on TV 1 in the bedroom at 11:07:51, and set the same blinds to 65% at 11:20:51. Enjoy your reading!
